creator: kevinz5000@gmail.com
text:
The descriptions for math/gnuplot could really use some updating. This patch does just that.
 - Update COMMENT and pkg-descr, based on the Official Gnuplot Manual
 - Fix conversion to OptionsNG (someone forgot NOPORTDOCS and NOPORTEXAMPLES)
 - Add EXAMPLES to the list of options
 - Use standard DESC lines for a few common options (like X11)
 - Trim ABI numbers from LIB_DEPENDS

Fix: Apply the attached patch (using `svn patch`) in ports/head/math/gnuplot.

Patch attached with submission follows:
